AltLayer Staking Portal

Welcome to the AltLayer Rollup Staking Portal! Stake your $ALT tokens now and earn up to 15% Annual Percentage Yield (APY)!
Staking provides economic security for the rollup. Get started by selecting one or more node operators you trust. Delegate your stake to the node operator(s) to earn rewards. You can spread your risk by delegating to more than one node operator.
*To verify you are not a bot, you may be asked for assets verification.

By using this product, you acknowledge having read the privacy policy and legal disclaimer
